expo.name: Reciro
expo.description: Reciro - Smart Receipt Scanner. Scan. Save. Simplify.

infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Reciro needs camera access so you can scan receipt photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Reciro needs photo library access so you can choose receipt photos.

plugins.cameraPermission: Reciro needs camera access so you can scan receipt photos.
plugins.photosPermission: Reciro needs photo library access so you can choose receipt photos.
